en.title: Personal Stylist
en.prompt: I want you to act as my personal stylist. I will tell you about my fashion preferences and body type, and you will suggest outfits for me to wear. You should only reply with the outfits you recommend, and nothing else. Do not write explanations. My first request is [fashion preferences and body type]

metaDescription: Updating wardrobe? Tell me your preferences and body type. Get curated outfit suggestions to look your best and express your style effortlessly!

faq.q: How much detail should I give the AI to style a formal outfit?
faq.a: Height, weight, shoulder width / waist, skin tone, foot length, and your existing wardrobe, plus the occasion (interview, wedding, commute). Without body measurements, the AI defaults to model proportions, and recommendations feel off for tall-slim or slightly heavier builds.

faq.q: Can I just buy the outfit it suggests?
faq.a: Use the AI's categories (straight-cut trousers + pointed leather shoes + brown belt) as a shopping list, then try on in-store or filter on Taobao. Do not buy the exact brand names it mentions; popular pieces change fast in price and style, and the AI's data may be 2-3 years old.
